Headline: Rick Smith: Pioneering Public Safety Solutions with Axon
Summary: Rick Smith, founder and CEO of Axon Enterprise (formerly TASER International), has revolutionized public safety by developing non-lethal technology and body-worn cameras. Motivated by personal tragedy, Smith built Axon from a startup into a global leader in evidence management and AI-powered tools, focusing on transparency and reducing fatalities. His leadership has guided Axon to a $50B+ valuation and continues to drive innovation in violence suppression.

Headline: TASER Self-Defense Partners with Kryptek to Launch Limited Edition Personal Self-Defense Product

This new device features Kryptek's Altitude camouflage pattern and uses the same non-lethal technology trusted by law enforcement. The partnership aims to further Axon's mission of protecting life by offering effective and easy-to-use self-defense tools.
